style_effects: Gentle water droplets cling to Vileplume's petals, slowly rising like suspended pearls before vanishing into the air; translucent bubbles drift upward in soft spirals, catching the soft blue light emanating from its pores. A calm, glowing aura of pale aquamarine radiates gently from its body, illuminating the surrounding mist with a cool, serene luminescence. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
